label: B2 (v10.4): paired family-bootstrap CIs for the Table S1 ladder deltas
design: rerun the geo15 Block C ladders (identical features, folds, model, exclusions); pool OOF probabilities; for each bootstrap draw resample FAMILIES once and evaluate all ladders on the same resample; report 90% CIs for each delta (vs R and vs R+L1)
note: Exploratory; no frozen confirmatory rule; seed label convention (not a timestamp). Complements, does not replace, the frozen geo15_heldout_auc.csv point estimates.
